commands.name: INIT
commands.description: Initialize a new, empty game data file at the specified path.

options.name: --fileName
options.description:
Path to the game data file to initialize. The file must not e
xist or must be empty. Example: `c:/mygamedata.json` or `/var
/mygame/gamedata.json`.

commands.name: MCP
commands.description:
Start an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server for AI assistant i
ntegration via stdio.
